principles: Motion confirms cause and effect: the user should feel that the interface responded to their action.
Use gentle scale and translate to give surfaces a sense of origin (where a menu or modal came from).
Keep durations in the perceptible-but-quick band so the product feels alive without slowing power users.
Reserve celebratory motion for rare, meaningful milestones, not routine saves.
Always ship a reduced-motion fallback that preserves the information, dropping only the embellishment.
entrance: Fade in plus an 8px translate and a 0.98 to 1.0 scale over base (220ms) with the decelerate curve, anchored to the element's trigger when one exists.
exit: Fade out plus a 6px translate over fast (150ms) with the accelerate curve; menus and popovers collapse toward their trigger.
spatial_navigation: Forward navigation slides the incoming view 16px from the trailing edge while the outgoing view fades; back reverses direction over base (220ms) to reinforce hierarchy.
list_changes: Inserts fade and grow from 0.98 scale over base (220ms); removes fade and collapse height; siblings animate to new positions with a spring-like decelerate curve.
status_change: Status changes cross-fade colour and icon over fast (150ms); a brief, single highlight pulse (no loop) may draw the eye on a change the user did not directly trigger.
loading: Skeletons fade in after 150ms and cross-fade to content over fast (150ms); progress for known-length work uses a determinate bar that eases, never resets backwards.
errors: Errors fade in with the inline message and a one-time 2px horizontal nudge (single, ~120ms) to signal rejection without an aggressive shake; the nudge is dropped under reduced-motion.
decorative_motion: Limited and opt-in: subtle hover elevation on cards and a one-shot success check draw. No infinite ambient loops in primary work areas.
reduced_motion: Translate, scale, spring, pulse, and nudge are all removed. Transitions become a fast (150ms) opacity cross-fade or an instant swap; loaders show static skeletons and final content with no animated transition.
